events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, singer, and songwriter Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! The Queen legend's iconic guitar riffs continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Queen track featuring Brian's unmistakable sound?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young today! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger, still strutting his stuff and proving that rock and roll never gets old. What's your top Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the game forever. August 1st, 1981, saw the birth of music television, kicking off with The Buggles. Did MTV shape your music taste?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming a defining record of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music. That album still sounds as fresh and vital today as it did in '94. What's your standout track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the legendary Woodstock Festival began. Three days of peace, music, and a generation defining itself. Which artist from the lineup would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: The world mourned the loss of 'The King of Rock and Roll,' Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the unparalleled talent of Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago. His music and legacy continue to captivate millions around the globe. Long live The King.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Legendary rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years since the hip-hop world lost a giant. Today, we reflect on the enduring impact and powerful lyrical genius of Tupac Shakur. His voice still resonates.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Tribute
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the incandescent talent of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago. His revolutionary approach to the guitar continues to inspire and astound.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969, marking their final recorded work together.

angles.name: Abbey Road Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is as iconic as the tracks within. What’s your favourite moment from their swan song?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The fierce and iconic frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer whose attitude and voice are as powerful as ever. What's your top Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and a true Britpop icon, Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Always original, always outspoken, and forever a rock and roll star. What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful anthem for peace, 'Imagine,' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that continues to resonate with a timeless message of hope and unity. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released anniversary
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, and it was released on November 10, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and changed everything. Suddenly, you could carry '1,000 songs in your pocket.' What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No,' on this day in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' hit screens. From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, what's your favourite 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary musician, songwriter, and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the profound impact of John Lennon. A visionary artist whose music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British actor, comedian, and writer, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, John Cleese, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the one and only John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is unparalleled. What's your favourite John Cleese character or sketch?
